Hello, dear developer of this game! This game is the best of all the Lethal Ape games! My friends and I would really love to see a new update that includes the following: please, add cameras to the “entrance” room and some new location with a monster similar to Gus; the location could be like the backrooms or something like that, but without the mine, because the mine location is already in all the Lethal Ape-themed games. And yes, make the monster in that location look like Gus, but have it be completely black with only small white eyes visible, (sound: Wake Up The Prisedent). Add a room to the lobby featuring statues of all the monsters in the game along with their names, and if possible, include their descriptions. So when I went to the dark rooms and when to the fire room ashy is Stuck by any chance can you take him out pls he in the fire room pls thank you. Fix bugs in the game, such as: when I move away from an object on the map, it disappears; somehow, it’s possible to push a monster off the map. Fix the mirror bugs, since when I walk away from the mirror, it freezes. Add a pool on the first floor. Add the original music to the lobby (lethal ape lobby theme). Add an “anti-entity cube”; if it’s already in the game, I apologize for that. Add an elevator to the game. Please, can you remove the explosion when a player dies? The game can freeze because of that explosion. Also, add a monitor with cameras on the second floor, just like in the original game. If possible, add the song “Tophats N’ Tools - Solar.mp3 (ChimpLab VR OST)” to play when entering the game; this would give some players a strong sense of nostalgia. If possible, add a Quest Cam to the game so players can easily record gameplay videos. Add more cosmetics and clothing to the store. PLEASE add a second floor near the lobby, like in the game “Lethal Ape 3 OG”—this is REALLY NEEDED!!!  Thanks so much in advance! I’m really looking forward to the new update! Good luck!

You all made the best game, I love it!
